mod utils {
    pub fn helper_a() -> i32 { 1 }
    pub fn helper_b() -> i32 { 2 }

    #[cfg(test)]
    pub fn test_helper() -> i32 { 3 }
}

pub fn compute(x: i32) -> i32 {
    x + utils::helper_a() + utils::helper_b()
}

#[cfg(test)]
mod tests {
    use super::*;

    #[test]
    fn test_compute() {
        assert_eq!(compute(1), 4);
    }
}
